name: jsonresume-component
when_to_use: 需要在浏览器中把 resume.json 原生挂成带 microdata 与 Shadow DOM 隔离的只读简历时用它而非手写,因为原生在结构化数据标注、完整章节覆盖和样式封装上失败;非做 PDF 版式器或简历编辑器。
why_valuable: AI 默认会漏 Schema.org microdata、章节边界与可访问标注,也无法稳定维护一套隔离的简历样式;该 custom element 直接消费 resume.json 并把语义与视觉同时封装。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to mount resume.json natively in the browser as a read-only resume with microdata and Shadow DOM isolation instead of hand-writing it. Native implementations fail on structured-data annotations, complete section coverage, and style encapsulation. It is not a PDF layout engine or resume editor.
en.why_valuable: AI omits Schema.org microdata, section boundaries, and accessibility annotations by default, and cannot reliably maintain an isolated resume style system. This custom element consumes resume.json directly and packages semantics and visuals together.

data_in.note: The native resumejson property takes an object, not a JSON string. basics.name is a hard component requirement. boot does not use gist_id/json_url, avoiding an additional GitHub API/CORS footprint.

basics.name: string - required; the component displays an error when missing
basics.label?: string - job title hidden by default
basics.location?: JSON Resume location object - location hidden by default

schema.preordered?: boolean - whether to order sections by the resume object's key order, default false

spec.note: The conservative boot predeclares an import map in an iframe, with an explicit default height of 900px and scrolling. AI may provide another pixel value; vh and percentage heights are prohibited.

data_in.note: 原生属性 resumejson 吃对象而不是 JSON 字符串;basics.name 是组件硬要求。boot 不走 gist_id/json_url,避免额外 GitHub API/CORS 足迹。
data_in._why_no_example: resume.json 是 AI 原生 JSON 记法,schema 足以校准,不附 minimal example。

basics.name: string —— 必填;缺失时组件显示错误
basics.label?: string —— 默认不显示职业标题
basics.location?: JSON Resume location 对象 —— 默认不显示地点

schema.preordered?: boolean —— 是否按 resume 对象键序排列章节,默认 false
schema.label?: string —— 外层 aria-label,默认 `${basics.name}'s resume`

spec.note: 保守 boot 用 iframe 预声明 import map,默认显式高 900px 并滚动;AI 可给其他像素值,禁止 vh 或百分比高。

carriers.widget: conditional:需 iframe srcdoc、import map、jsDelivr 多模块和 Shadow DOM;组件自身另有 shadow,不向宿主 head 注入 CSS
carriers.codex: conditional:包根 /+esm 当前由 jsDelivr 返回错误,必须保留已核对的 dist + import map 路径

isolation.evidence: LitElement web component with its own shadow root; the boot loads it inside an iframe + import map because bare `/+esm` fails, so from the host every style/DOM/event is iframe-scoped. dist imports `lit`/`@lit/task`/lit directives (matched by boot import map). gist_id/json_url would hit the GitHub gist API (dist: fetch(api.github.com/gists/...)), but the boot sets `resumejson` directly, avoiding that fetch; no global host listeners added. Shadow-compatible only via the iframe+importmap wrapper (import maps are document-level, can't be injected into an existing shadow root).

basics.name: Ada Lovelace
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Front-end engineer focused on accessible, semantic web components.

work.name: Analytical Engines Ltd
work.summary: Built a design system of accessible web components used across five product teams.

projects.name: resume-microdata
projects.description: A flat JSON Resume theme with schema.org microdata.
